function.name: create_tool_package
function.description: Create a complete AI tool package with a folder, main.py implementation file, manifest.json, package init, and manifest test. Can also overwrite standard files when explicitly asked to rebuild a broken tool.

package_name.description: Folder/package name for the tool. It will be normalized to lowercase snake_case.

function_name.description: Python function name exposed as the tool entrypoint.

description.description: User-facing description of what the generated tool does.

parameters_schema.description: JSON schema for the generated function parameters. Must be an object schema with properties and required.

implementation_code.description: Full Python source for main.py. It must define the requested function_name at top level. If omitted, a scaffold implementation is created.

category.description: Tool category used by the agent selector. Defaults to custom.

overwrite.description: Whether to overwrite the standard files if the tool package already exists.

function.name: diagnose_tool_packages
function.description: Check one or all AI tool packages for missing files, invalid manifests, Python syntax errors, bad imports, and missing entrypoint functions before repairing them.

package_name.description: Optional tool package folder name to inspect. If omitted, all tool packages are checked.

function.name: repair_tool_package
function.description: Fix or rebuild a broken AI tool package by overwriting its standard files with corrected main.py code, manifest.json metadata, package init, and manifest test.

package_name.description: Folder/package name for the tool to repair. It will be normalized to lowercase snake_case.

function_name.description: Python function name exposed as the repaired tool entrypoint.

description.description: User-facing description of what the repaired tool does.

parameters_schema.description: JSON schema for the repaired function parameters. Must be an object schema with properties and required.

implementation_code.description: Full corrected Python source for main.py. It must define the requested function_name at top level. If omitted, a scaffold implementation is created.

category.description: Tool category used by the agent selector. Defaults to custom.
